title: On Two Ministers Of State
content:
Lump says that Caliban's of gutter breed,
    And Caliban says Lump's a fool indeed,
    And Caliban and Lump and I are all agreed.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Hilaire Belloc delivers a powerful performance in "On Two Ministers Of State"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
